title: Modify Camera Collision
description: Change how your camera collision works in third-person view!
body:
Change how your camera collision works in third-person view!

Have you ever wondered why the Glass won't squeeze your F5 view while the Barrier does?

This mod allows you to customize what blocks should squeeze your camera and what blocks should not.

This mod has been tested on [1.17.1], [1.18.2], [1.19], [1.19.4], [1.20], [1.20.1], [1.21].

**[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) is required!**

**You can configurate this mod by using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), or just edit the JSON file of configuration (Restarting Minecraft is required if you choose the latter).**

| with this mod          | without this mod           |
|------------------------|----------------------------|
| ![on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TbGPEeYZ/images/d6898e25e7f15103cf4656e85a1c5d60b3c2a4aa.png) | ![off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TbGPEeYZ/images/eee262616248fdd08d110b6fef718384f6afaf85.png) |
